seasons.season_description: The original Rainbow Six Siege experience, with all the operators and maps from the first year of the game.
Continue the Siege with the first major content update, Operation Black Ice, which gives you access to the new Yacht map, two new JTF2 operators.
The Siege continues with Operation Dust Line, which introduces the new Border map and two new Navy SEAL operators.
The Siege continues with Operation Skull Rain, which introduces the new favela map and two new BOPE operators.
The Siege continues with Operation Red Crow, which introduces the new skyscraper map and two new SAT operators.
